nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Mindoro cuckooshrike
nodes.summary: Mindoro cuckooshrike（Mindoro cuckooshrike，学名 Coracina mindorensis），已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: Mount Halcon
nodes.summary: Mount Halcon是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括菲律賓鴉鵑、Mindoro cuckooshrike，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: Mounts Iglit–Baco Natural Park
nodes.summary: Mounts Iglit–Baco Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括菲律賓鴉鵑、Mindoro cuckooshrike、绿背啸鹟等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 加萊拉港
nodes.summary: 加萊拉港是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Mindoro hornbill、Mindoro cuckooshrike，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Mount Calavite
nodes.summary: Mount Calavite is a peak located in the island of Mindoro in the Philippines.

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Dynamite blasting for marble is an additional threat to forest at Puerto Galera Occurs in a few protected areas in the Dubduban Watershed in Tablas, Mount Halcon, Mounts Iglit–Baco Natural Park, Mount Calavite and the Siburan Forest Reserve but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lownland and montane forests up to 2,000 meters above sea level

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, and conversion into farmlands through Slash-and-burn and other methods.The species does not occur at high density even within the little remaining forest cover on Tablas
